transcript.text:
(Stack, stack, stack, stack...)
(The endlessly stacked menu of the day)
(Steamed clams) Awesome! Thank you!
(Steamed clams, a.k.a. steamed seafood) Oh, thank you
(Looks so plump) Wow! This is so soft
(And it tastes...)
So crazy
(Endlessly inhaling the popular clams)
(Starting the merciless clam mukbang)
Hello, everyone
Today I'm at...
Simdang-dong
I mean Sindang-dong!
I'm at a steamed clam restaurant called 'Bbeol House'
This place opens from 5 a.m.
So a lot of the Dongdaemun merchants around there visit here

If they open at 5 a.m., when does the owner sleep...?
Apparently, they serve steamed clam with chicken!
It looked fascinating, so I decided to make a visit
('Bbeol House', Dasan-ro, Jung-gu, Seoul) Ta-da! I'm here!
'Bbeol House', let's go inside!
(Enters the restaurant) Wow, I see clams!
Wow, these clams look delicious haha
(A variety of clams fill the tank) The scallops are big, look at the scallops!
The scallops are huge
They also have red scallops!
And pen shells, too!
- I'm your subscriber haha - Really?
Yay, thank you!
Wow, look over there
That's the menu, and there's a lot of stuff
(Full of snacks) Perfect for drinking!

(Tzuyang drinking again...) Do I have to drink alone again?
Excuse me, how many servings is the extra-large steamed clam?
- About 4~5 people - About 4~5?
Can I order more clams?
You can order extra scallops or a platter
Then I'll have an extra-large steamed clam
with an extra platter
and also extra scallops...
three times, please!
- Three times? - Yes
(Is that possible...?)
- It includes pen shells, right? - Yes, it does
Then can I have like...
3 more of them?
3 more pen shells?
So 4 in total

(Dizzy...) Four?
(An order that even surprises a subscriber...) Okay
That's a lot... That's too much
(Clams are here)
(A feast of clams in a pot) Awesome! Thank you!
- Please eat it immediately - Okay, thank you
Looks good!
Wow, but the scallops are really big inside
Look how plump it is!
(Looks so plump) Wow! This is so soft right now
Excuse me, could I order one cheese fondue?
Let's first try it with the soy sauce
Dip it in
(Explodes with juices...!) That's really moist
I'm going to try a red scallop!
(Tiny but flavorful red scallops) Red scallops are very tiny

But they're plump and delicious!
Let's try it with chojang* *Vinegar with sweet and spicy pepper sauce
The longer the clams are cooked, the tougher they become
It's perfectly cooked right now
Oh, and oysters!
(And it looks so plump!) Awesome!
So crazy, this is insanely good!
They're cooked so well, not tough and it's moist
Oh, I found it
(One chicken hiding in the clams) There's a chicken!
Pen shell!
Let's try the pen shell first!
(Huge) Wow
(Scallop) Wow! For this...
let's cut it up...
Pen shell scallop!

Oh, so hot!
Wow, it's perfectly cooked
(Satisfied...)
Wow, it tastes so refreshing
(Shivers)
(Cheese fondue)
- Thank you! - No problem
(Cheese fondue is a must when eating clams) Wow, look at that cheese melting immediately!
This is so cool
Excuse me, what clam is this one?
That's the ocean quahog
Oh, is it?
- Yes, the littleneck clam - The littleneck clam?
Oh, that's interesting!
The quahog is also delicious
This littleneck...

pops in the mouth
and tastes very soft
We also call it the 'water gun clam'
Let's get the quahog
and collect it
Scallop!
Get one scallop
(The all-purpose scallop shell instead of a spoon...) And put a spoonful of chojang like this
(Thumbs up)
Delicious
Let's pull out all the small ones
(Separating the little clams...)
(Done separating)
Looks delicious!
Wow, cheese!
(Deliciously melted cheese fondue) No! I need to eat it right away

Wow, it's amazing
Scallops
with the 'water gun clam'
Quahog
And the mussel
In one bite!
Looks delicious
Mussel!
Let's eat the pen shell scallop
Put on the scallop
Oh, it's good
Will the oyster open?
But I've never seen a clam restaurant that opens at 5 a.m....
It's perfect when you suddenly crave steamed clams in the morning
(Not under construction)
(Excused) I'll have to eat that later

(Separation of clams, round 2...)
(Full of clams)
Wow, the pen shell!
(Enormous) Look at that size!
I separated a lot of them here!
This pen shell has an amazing crunchy texture
If I cook it for too long, it turns tough, so I'll eat it fast!
It tastes great even dipped in just salt
It's super chewy
I'm gonna make a real mountain of shells
And oysters...
Wow, this oyster is a killing two birds with one stone
Mini oyster!
(It's so cute, I should eat it) Too cute
(She eats so well...)
(Adding cheese) Thank you!

(Already down to two buckets...)
(Giving another shell bucket) Thank you!
(Making a mountain of shells...)
(Sea squirt service) Wow, thank you! Wow!
(They're calling for soju...) Oh, should I drink soju again?
I collected a lot of them here
The soup is amazing
Let's try the sea squirts
(Overflowing juice..!) Look at that!
This sea squirt is so sweet...! It's super sweet!
After finishing the sea squirt,
take the leftovers here
(Tzuyang's TIP on tasting special soju) Don't throw it away, pour soju in it, it tastes amazing
(Hardworking shells) They're working so hard
(And the cheese too...!) Wow, this isn't cutting off!
Take the scallop...

I mean, the pen shell
(Bunch of cheese)
(This cheese is so crazy) Please cut it! It's staying too long...
It won't cut off
Finally!
So delicious
And now...
let's finish the rest!
(The chicken that got forgotten behind the clams) Now that I think about it, I haven't tried the chicken
(I had forgotten about this one...) Why would chicken be in steamed clams?
Isn't it so cool?
Let's get this chicken drumstick first
(Checking the temperature : HOT)
I'll cool it down first
Let's pull off both of the chicken drumsticks
Done!

(Finally realizing what salt is for) So this is what the salt is for!
I've got a good idea
Let's get the chicken boobs...
(Boobs...?)
(Chicken boob wrap)
(Cheese is a perfect pairing food lol) Cheese seems to go well with everything
Before I eat up this chicken,
let's quickly eat this cheese fondue before it hardens
There's a squid in here...
Oh right, I had this!
(Cuttlefish appears...!) Isn't that my favorite kind of squid?
I love cuttlefish
(Head sliced for being cute...) This cuttlefish is so cute
So delicious
It's kind of a translucent texture...
(Error) How should I say it?

(Two arms crossed) She's amazing
If she eats like that, shouldn't she be working out for 12 hours?!
(That's not her thing...) I don't exercise
(The mysteries of the human body...) I should though...
You don't eat like this all the time, right?
I eat like this every day!
Oh my goodness...
I want to eat more of this cheese
(Lingering regrets) Pen shell!
(She couldn't resist after all LOL) One more cheese, please
I can eat the chicken until the cheese arrives
This...
chicken is so delicious because
the soup is salty, right?
So it's all seeped into the chicken
Let's eat this cuttlefish

Pull off all the chicken meat
Chicken kalguksu*+ *Noodle soup
With the clams too
The so-called 'Chicken Clam Kalguksu'
Let's make it!
(Pulling off the chicken meat)
(Extra cheese fondue) Oh! It's nicely cooked!
(Cheese fondue that pairs well with scallops)
(Leftover scallops to dip in cheese...)
(Noodles are here)
(Dropping the noodles into the rich clam soup!) The noodles are cooked!
- Wow, thank you! - No problem!
Cheese-covered scallops!
(It's melting so nicely... heh)
Oh no!
(Oh no...) My pants! I made a mess

(Reality check) Why did I do that?
It's so delicious
Oh, and the chicken
The chicken meat
Chicken boobs
(Surprised) Chicken, what?!!
Chicken boobs
(The producer panicked, thinking it's a weird word LOL) Are you talking about chicken breasts?
The noodles are so good
They're very soft
Perfect time to eat it
Oh, so hot
Aaah
Aaaarrh
(Please blow it before you eat...)
Aaaah

Urrrgh
SO HOT!
(Making the viewers frustrated) THIS IS SO HOT
(A meal you can't help but watch...) Amazing
It'll take me two days to eat like that
The last clam!
(Complete)
(Applause)
I'll be full just on that Coke
- My nephew is in third grade and he's a huge fan - Oh, really?
(Video call) Hold on!
(Ta-da)
(Covers his mouth...)
(Shy)
I can't get my mind straight
Study hard and stay healthy

- Thank you - He's so healthy
I had a great meal once again!
